rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit type declarations in AGREE to match AADL data types.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
Write range assumptions using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or features.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
